reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only — they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades — never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

down_bias_gate.note: restrict-only: harvest DOWN/TV asymmetry by blocking proven-losing UP stacks

mtf_gate.note: observe-only conflict veto: blocks 4m/5m fast-pair conflict only (loop arch default). require_confirm/side_align are opt-in restrict-only layers, not trade authority.

confidence_tier.note: At 15m TTC sweet spot, TV MTF regime adjusts min_edge/max_price only. TV trade gates remain off per operator lock.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade — learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: With 53 settled trades, overall win rate 60.4% and positive avg EV after cost (0.116) confirm mild edge, driven by DOWN signals in trending/Hurst regimes, normal BB state, strong ADX, sell-pressure CVD, bearish MTF alignment, and 120-240s TTC; most other buckets remain too small (n<8) or show negative realized PnL. DOWN_STRONG and z-score -2..1/-1..1 stand out as confirmed while UP and long-TTC buckets are weaker. No material change possible on first analysis.
failing: expansion/squeeze BB states (n=10+18, WR ~0.5, negative PnL)
warnings: Total n=53 still small; ignore all buckets n<8
many high-WR buckets have n<=12 so unstable
positive EV but tiny realized PnL (+1.35 USD)
focus_next: accumulate samples in bearish_aligned + normal BB + sell_pressure CVD intersection

history.summary: With n=53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (esp. bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, strong ADX) show confirmed positive EV (wr 0.65-0.83, aggregate pnl +15 to +30 USD) while UP signals and long holds remain marginal or negative. Sample still small; only buckets n>=8 considered, with DOWN_STRONG, bearish supertrend, and range-middle emerging as clearest edges above breakeven after costs.

With 53 settled trades, confirmed profitable patterns center on DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (n=50, wr=0.64), normal BB state (n=16, wr=0.875), 120-240s TTC (n=26, wr=0.731), bearish MTF alignment (n=12, wr=0.833), and sell-pressure CVD (n=19, wr=0.737), all showing positive EV after costs and n>=8. Many other buckets remain below reliable thresholds or show mixed/negative results despite adequate samples. No prior analysis provided so changes are not assessable.
changes_since_last: First analysis; sample of 53 now available for initial pattern detection

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, confirmed positive EV edges exist in DOWN_STRONG signals (n=26, wr=0.692), trending regimes (n=50), z-score -2..1, 120-240s TTC (n=26, wr=0.731), BB normal state (n=16, wr=0.875), dead volume, strong ADX, and bearish-aligned MTF, all with wr confidently above breakeven and positive avg_ev_after_cost. UP signals, >=240s holds, active volume, and expansion/squeeze BB states show negative or marginal realized pnl despite some ev. Sample remains small overall; many buckets ignored due to n<8.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes show confirmed edge (0.69 WR, +15.5 pnl, EV 0.136) while UP_STRONG remains marginal; normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, bearish-aligned MTF, and sell-pressure CVD also clear n>=8 thresholds with positive EV. Many other buckets (zscore extremes, range states, volume active) are still noisy or negative despite larger n. Sample remains too small for live deployment.
changes_since_last: first analysis, no prior; sample grew from 0 to 53 settled trades

history.summary: With n=53 total settled trades, confirmed positive EV patterns (n>=8, wr>breakeven, positive pnl) center on DOWN_STRONG signals in trending/Hurst regimes, normal BB state, dead volume, strong ADX trend, bearish MTF alignment, CVD sell pressure, zscore -2..1, and 120-240s TTC. UP signals and >=240s holds show negative realized pnl despite positive avg EV. Sample remains too small for most sub-buckets.

With only 53 settled trades, overall win rate 0.604 and tiny positive EV (0.116) after costs, a handful of buckets with n>=8 now show confirmed edge: DOWN direction/strong signals, trending/Hurst, 120-240s TTC, normal BB state, dead volume, strong ADX trend, bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD, and range-middle/bottom all deliver win rates 0.65-0.83 with positive realized PnL. Most other slices remain below reliable thresholds or show negative PnL despite decent EV. Sample is still too thin for live deployment.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN direction, trending/hurst, zscore -2..1, ttc 120-240s, bb_normal, adx_strong, mtf_bearish_aligned, cvd_sell_pressure, and range_middle show confirmed positive EV and win-rates above breakeven with n>=8; overall pnl modestly positive but many regimes remain mixed or negative. Patterns in bb_normal (wr 0.875) and mtf_bearish_aligned (wr 0.833) stand out as robust while active volume, htf_bullish, and bb_squeeze/expansion are failing. No prior analysis available so all observations are new.
changes_since_last: Initial analysis; no prior results to compare

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, overall win rate 60.4% and positive avg EV after cost (0.116) confirm mild edge, driven by DOWN signals in trending/Hurst regimes, normal BB state, strong ADX, sell-pressure CVD, bearish MTF alignment, and 120-240s TTC; most other buckets remain too small (n<8) or show negative realized PnL. DOWN_STRONG and z-score -2..1/-1..1 stand out as confirmed while UP and long-TTC buckets are weaker. No material change possible on first analysis.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only — never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

headlines: BTC below $60k with ongoing ETF outflows and weekly losses
Michael Saylor/Strategy Bitcoin accumulation updates amid market scrutiny
No major macro prints, liquidations or regulatory headlines in last ~30min

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

last_note.summary: 126 settled trades, 63.5% win rate, +$47 PnL, profit factor 1.22. Strong DOWN-side asymmetry (106 down vs 20 up, 66% down win rate vs 50% up). However, sample sizes per context are critically thin (most buckets n=1), edge_quality calibration shows model overconfidence (0.3-0.5 buckets predict ~40-50% but realize ~30-36% up), and avg loss ($4.67) exceeds avg win ($3.28) - unsustainable without higher win rate. 215/222 execution rejects were underdog_price_below_floor, indicating aggressive pricing assumptions. Data is too sparse to claim any context has robust, repeatable edge.

knob_recommendations.reason: 215 rejects suggest floor too aggressive; raise to reduce overfitting tail opportunities
Most buckets n=1; require >=20 to gate contexts before allowing execution
DOWN overperforms but sample imbalance (106 vs 20) risks overfitting; temper bias 15%
0.3-0.5 buckets show 6-14pp overconfidence; increase historical calibration anchor

new_lessons.rule: Never trade contexts with n<20 settled; single-trade buckets are noise not signal
DOWN 66% vs UP 50% win rate on 5:1 imbalance suggests structural bias not alpha; verify causality
Avg loss $4.67 > avg win $3.28 requires 59%+ win rate to break even; current 63.5% has no margin
97% execution rejects (215/222) from price floor means model chases mispriced tails; tighten entry
Model predicts 30-50% up but realizes 30-36%; recalibrate or widen no-trade zone to 0.35-0.65

research_loop.note: strategy-layer research meta-loop: independent model proposes exploit/avoid contexts + bounded knob nudges + lessons. Observe-only unless auto_apply (whitelisted+bounded). PAPER ONLY.

recent.rule: hurst_regime=trending shows 100% WR (5/5) and +$20.72; require n>=20 in this regime before claiming robustness
119/125 trades lack context dimension tags and dilute overall edge; gate logic must populate all dimensions or reject unknowns
PF=1.20 is minimal for 5-min noise; target >=1.5 in paper before considering any live exposure
zscore_bucket=na lost (1/1, -$5); missing zscore implies no mean-reversion signal—reject immediately
markov_state=stale_polymarket_down lost (1/1, -$5); stale oracle data negates edge—hard-block this state
markov_state=chop_noise won 100% (4/4, +$17.10); small sample but coherent with sideways exploit—track for n>=15
215/222 execution rejects due to underdog_price_below_floor; recalibrate floor or relax if starving high-edge opportunities
Never trade contexts with n<20 settled; single-trade buckets are noise not signal
DOWN 66% vs UP 50% win rate on 5:1 imbalance suggests structural bias not alpha; verify causality
Avg loss $4.67 > avg win $3.28 requires 59%+ win rate to break even; current 63.5% has no margin
97% execution rejects (215/222) from price floor means model chases mispriced tails; tighten entry
Model predicts 30-50% up but realizes 30-36%; recalibrate or widen no-trade zone to 0.35-0.65

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book: BUY-both (asks<$1) + SELL-both (mint $1 set, sell bids>$1); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional. PAPER ONLY.

dependency_arbitrage.note: LCMM nested-window scanner + optional paper execution on validated nested_implication violations.

arb_graph.note: Graph is rebuilt each tick from open windows; Grok edges are never tradable alone.

proposal.description: Both 5m windows (1:20-1:25 and 1:25-1:30) lie strictly inside the 15m window 1:15-1:30.

violation.description: Both 5m windows (1:20-1:25 and 1:25-1:30) lie strictly inside the 15m window 1:15-1:30.

baseline_cohort_gate.note: baseline quant path: 180-240s TTC band (scaled on 15m), high edge + strong CEX; UP blocked until promoted; green_path=15m DOWN cohort only (TV observe-only)

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective — never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

bucket_evidence.rule: blocked iff confidently_losing AND fdr_significant (Wilson upper < breakeven, PF < min, BH-FDR q=0.10)

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

arbitrage.note: arb halt only on anomaly (guaranteed_profit<=0); risk-free P&L is segregated

dependency_arbitrage.note: Lane B halt on booking anomaly only; walk-forward is observability

stop_conditions.note: quantitative kill switches checked each tick from settled ledger evidence; NOT the LLM's opinion. Halting blocks NEW entries only.

execution_realistic_edge.note: KL divergence is observe-only — large KL means model disagrees with market; never a buy signal when model Brier > market Brier.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book: BUY-both (asks<$1) + SELL-both (mint $1 set, sell bids>$1); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional. PAPER ONLY.

Most other slices remain below reliable thresholds or show negative PnL despite decent EV. Sample is still too thin for live deployment.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN direction, trending/hurst, zscore -2..1, ttc 120-240s, bb_normal, adx_strong, mtf_bearish_aligned, cvd_sell_pressure, and range_middle show confirmed positive EV and win-rates above breakeven with n>=8; overall pnl modestly positive but many regimes remain mixed or negative. Patterns in bb_normal (wr 0.875) and mtf_bearish_aligned (wr 0.833) stand out as robust while active volume, htf_bullish, and bb_squeeze/expansion are failing. No prior analysis available so all observations are new.
changes_since_last: Initial analysis; no prior results to compare

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, overall win rate 60.4% and positive avg EV after cost (0.116) confirm mild edge, driven by DOWN signals in trending/Hurst regimes, normal BB state, strong ADX, sell-pressure CVD, bearish MTF alignment, and 120-240s TTC; most other buckets remain too small (n<8) or show negative realized PnL. DOWN_STRONG and z-score -2..1/-1..1 stand out as confirmed while UP and long-TTC buckets are weaker. No material change possible on first analysis.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only — never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

trading_performance.note: Profitability, win-rate, side balance (DOWN>UP), and ledger integrity.

operation.note: Engine health: reconciliation, loops, stops, and pipeline activity.

external_signals.note: External signal quality and how well signals align with bot outcomes.
